backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing user profiles with access control plus a public contact inquiry system with admin-only retrieval APIs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping branding update requirements to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Compiled list of short summaries for all main frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and styles.
frontend/DOMAIN_SETUP.md: Guide explaining how to connect escoffiers.com to an Internet Computer frontend canister via DNS.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based style sheet defining OKLCH color variables, dark mode, and base styling.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document setting metadata, fonts, and script entry point for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React router setup defining layout and routes including admin-protected inquiries page.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminNavLi: Navigation link component showing an Admin link only when a user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating Internet Identity with loading and error handling states.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Wrapper component that gates content behind authentication, showing a sign-in prompt when needed.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactD: Displays contact information including location, email, business hours, and a response-time note in styled cards.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: Renders a contact form with validation and submits inquiries via a custom hook, resetting on success.
frontend/src/components/site/Container.t: Provides a responsive layout wrapper that applies standard container padding and width classes.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Shows site footer with branding, quick links, contact info, and a copyright note.
frontend/src/components/site/Header.tsx: Implements the site header with logo, navigation links, authentication buttons, and a mobile menu sheet.
frontend/src/components/site/Section.tsx: Wraps content in a section with configurable padding using utility classes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInquiries.ts: Provides hooks for fetching all inquiries or a single inquiry from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, providing login, logout, and identity context to the app.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Updates document title and meta tags for SEO and Open Graph based on provided page metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitInquiry.ts: Submits a new inquiry via the backend actor, invalidates inquiry queries, and shows success or error toasts.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes with nature-inspired colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity provider before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page with company background, mission, vision, and descriptive content using layout components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Inquiries.tsx: Admin page displaying all contact inquiries with loading/error states and a dialog for viewing individual inquiry details.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Implements the Contact page with a form, contact details, and a success message state.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Displays the homepage hero, introduction, and key features promoting consulting and hospitality services.
frontend/src/pages/Recruitment.tsx: Presents recruitment services with sections for domestic and international hiring and detailed service descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Shows the services list with icons and descriptions covering consulting, kitchen design, menu development, and more.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters, including persisted parameter handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, colors, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata outlining site goals, domain setup notes, features, issues, and architectural decisions.
